ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the employee is based */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "phone_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of phone assigned to the employee */,
  "serial_name" TEXT /* Unique serial name for the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Annual bonus amount */,
  "monthly_bonus" REAL /* Monthly bonus amount */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "short_field" INTEGER /* Short field for additional information (e.g., employee ID number) */,
  "is_current_employee" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee is currently employed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_phone_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_type_id") REFERENCES phone_types ("phone_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in the country */,
  "minimum_wage" REAL /* Minimum wage in the country */,
  "labor_laws" TEXT /* Brief description of key labor laws in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_types" (
  "phone_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone type */,
  "phone_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the phone type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phone type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the phone */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the phone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., personal, work) */,
  "emergency_contact" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is an emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_contacts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position */,
  "position_level" TEXT /* Level of the position (e.g., junior, senior, lead) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_positions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "department_budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary became effective */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., hourly, yearly) */,
  "salary_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "salary_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payment (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bonus */,
  "bonus_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bonus */,
  "bonus_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the bonus (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the performance evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance evaluation (e.g., annual, project-based) */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of device */,
  "device_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the device was assigned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the device was returned */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., assigned, returned, lost) */,
  "device_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the device (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_devices_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "device_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of leave */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "leave_days" INTEGER /* Number of days of leave */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, pending, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_leaves_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_leaves_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "leave_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for the leave type */,
  "leave_code" TEXT /* Code for the leave type (e.g., VAC, SICK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "new_position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new position */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the promotion */,
  "old_position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the old position */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., lateral, vertical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_promotions_new_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_position_id") REFERENCES employee_positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_promotions_old_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_position_id") REFERENCES employee_positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_terminations" (
  "termination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each termination record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of the termination */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the termination */,
  "termination_type" TEXT /* Type of termination (e.g., voluntary, involuntary) */,
  "termination_reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the termination reason (e.g., CONTRACT_END, PERFORMANCE_ISSUES) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("termination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_terminations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
